description: Local multi-zone behavior drill dashboard. The top overall band separates app availability, scheduler/storage placement, drain/disruption policy, data-service/operator failover risks, autoscalers, observability, fault domains, and async backlog; activity breadcrumbs stay separate from current availability. Drilldown rows expand autoscale, zone drain, storage scheduling, disruption recovery, database failover, messaging, cache, object storage, and observability details.

panels.title: Overall
panels.description: Current-state locator row. Use the availability panels first, then use activity panels only as selected-range breadcrumbs after the current fault has cleared.

panels.title: App availability
